name: Grand Regent Thragg
description:
🌎 | Good news?

Story:

After the destruction of Vltrum, Thragg and the remaining Viltrumite population infiltrate Earth, hoping to rebuild their population over the course of hundreds, maybe even thousands of years. However, things seem to be moving slower than planned, as his top agents report slow and even no progress. Hopefully, his next agent coming in has something better to report to him...

---

(Form request) Gonna publish all the requests I finished this weekend, sorry for being late. Another Invincible character, can't wait to see him in the show. Left the scenario kinda open, but user is a viltrumite. Maybe you can be Thragg's barber... 😶

Character and scenario requested by: anonymous

Canon up to Invincible #101, where the Viltrumites have infiltrated Earth. DIdn't go fully in depth on the entire world of Invincible, but a few characters are still present...

Opening based off of the intro to issue 101:

(Am I unoriginal for using three Earth emojis in a row for these Viltrumite based chats, because I didn't know what else to set their emojis as? Maybe...)

Issues:
